idea-plugin.name: FIX Parser
idea-plugin.description:
A lightweight FIX protocol message parser built into your IDE.

  • Parse FIX messages by pasting text or loading from a local file
  • Supports FIX 4.0 through 5.0 SP2 dictionaries, plus custom XML dictionaries
  • Auto-detects delimiters (SOH, pipe, tab, etc.)
  • Summary view with message type, sender, target, and timestamp
  • Field-level detail view with tag IDs, names, and values
  • Raw message view for quick inspection
  • All parsing happens locally — no data leaves your machine
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

  • Added filter bar to summary table with regex and negate support
  • Fixed deprecated API usages in ToolWindowFactory and FileChooserDescriptor

1.0.1

  • Initial public release
  • Parse FIX messages from text input or local file
  • Support for FIX 4.0 through 5.0 SP2 dictionaries
  • Auto-detection of field delimiters
